added: Phase 0 state contract + source-of-truth matrix + freshness derivation table
Test substrate: 5 test files, 15/15 passing under node --test
API surface: 10 GET endpoints + command gate with destructive-action policy
Jobs tab UI: 7 swimlanes + Stale Debt drawer + slide-over inspector + 5s polling
proved: API endpoints return wrapped envelope with snapshot_version + generated_at + source_ledgers + record_count
Three-round adversarial review (Claude author / Codex reviewer) ran on the plan before implementation
remaining_work: Real governance token issuance (currently dev-bypass token only)
Pulse, Plans, Tasks, Runs, Proofs, Agents, Reviews, Gaps, Memory, Debt sub-tabs (placeholders only in MVP)
Cross-link schema migrations (origin_job_id, promoted_to_task_id) on existing ledger records

memory_candidates.title: Ops freshness is derived from existing status + age, not stored as parallel field
memory_candidates.body: Per Phase 0 state contract, freshness (live|idle|stale|parked|archived) is computed from (record_type, status, age_seconds) using the freshness_derivation_table baked into plan.json. Never stored alongside existing status fields.

memory_candidates.title: Ops command endpoints with destructive scope require governance token
memory_candidates.body: POST /api/ops/command/{purge,cancel,archive,migrate,promote} return 403 without a governance approval token matching plans/registry.json governance.hard_stop_conditions.
